description.initial: A simple archway of white stone. Beyond it, mirrors stretch into infinity, each reflecting you from a slightly different angle. Your father said this was the way out. He also said he couldn't do it alone.
description.return: The Mirror Labyrinth. The final challenge awaits within.
description.atmospheric: Infinite reflections stare back at you. Every version of yourself, waiting to ask the hard questions.

south.blockedMessage: The labyrinth's walls extend endlessly. The only exit is through truth.

interactables.name: Stone Arch
interactables.examineText: The entrance to the Mirror Labyrinth. Beyond it, countless reflections wait to test your honesty. Your father failed this test alone. Together, you might succeed.
interactables.interactionText: You and your father enter the labyrinth together. The mirrors close in around you, and your reflections begin to speak, asking questions you've been avoiding your whole life. But together, you face the truth.
